title: サイレンススズカ、覚醒②

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day near the end of June...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Etsuko Otonashi's invitation, we go to
spectate the Takarazuka Kinen—the Grand Prix
race of the spring season.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners have entered the backstretch, vying
for the mantle of this year's Grand Prix!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is the fan favorite for this race.
She's been on a winning streak since her return
from Hong Kong.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
However, she's up against the previous
Umamusume of the Year, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
This race will certainly be a turning point in
Silence Suzuka's career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's become a showdown between the seemingly
unstoppable Silence Suzuka, and Air Groove, the
Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering her achievements last year, I came in
expecting Air Groove to have the advantage,
but...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is in the lead as the runners enter
the final stretch! However, Air Groove is quickly
closing in from the outside!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But in the end, it's Silence Suzuka! Silence Suzuka
makes one final push and crosses the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! She crossed the finish line without
anybody passin' her! Suzuka sure knows how to
run!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it... To think she was powerful
enough to beat even someone like Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Make no mistake—at this moment, Silence Suzuka
is no less than a top-class runner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Combined with her undeniable talent, Silence
Suzuka's victory over an Umamusume of the Year
like Air Groove is sure to leave a lasting
impression.
